meta.schemaNote: See README.md -> 'Appending New Words' section before editing this file.

words.trick: Think A-BATE = bait to calm a fish.
A bear acting like a human.
AB-HOR sounds like 'a bore' - we abhor things that bore us.
Reject someone and they live in abject poverty.

examples: An abridged version of the book.

words.trick: AB + SECOND = leave in a split second.
Avoiding a stain on your record.
A strong accent makes speech noticeable.
People loudly claim how good something is.
Like an electric cord connecting two plugs.
Sharp men who pick up cues instantly.
Adam the ant refuses to move.
Rushing to claim a lottery win.
Ambi means two, can mean two things.
Give a 'piece' to make someone happy.
Grab the hand of a criminal.
Sitting on your 'ass' and working hard.
Similar to becoming part of a whole.
A student who is very smart.
Achieve what you are aiming at.
A very rich person greedy for more.
Sounds like an explosion of words.
Earth has a dearth of water.

examples: The constant din of the city.
